name: sum_even_indexed
mojo_unit:
def sum_even_indexed(v: List[Int]) -> Int:
    var s = 0
    var i = 0
    while i < len(v):
        s += v[i]
        i += 2
    return s
mojo_driver:
def main():
    var a: List[Int] = [1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6]
    print(sum_even_indexed(a))
    var b: List[Int] = [10, 20, 30]
    print(sum_even_indexed(b))

name: gray_code
cpp_unit: long gray_code(long n){ return n ^ (n >> 1); }
mojo_unit:
def gray_code(n: Int) -> Int:
    return n ^ (n >> 1)

name: armstrong_check
mojo_unit:
def armstrong_check(n: Int) -> Bool:
    var x = n
    var digits = 0
    while x > 0:
        digits += 1
        x = x // 10
    x = n
    var s = 0
    while x > 0:
        var d = x % 10
        var p = 1
        for _i in range(digits):
            p *= d
        s += p
        x = x // 10
    return s == n
mojo_driver:
def main():
    print(1 if armstrong_check(153) else 0)
    print(1 if armstrong_check(370) else 0)
    print(1 if armstrong_check(100) else 0)
    print(1 if armstrong_check(9474) else 0)
